tldr_weapon: Serpent Spine R5 (BP) / Akuoumaru R5 / Prototype Archaic (F2P)
tldr_artifact: 4pc Emblem of Severed Fate / 2pc TF + 2pc ATK%
intro: Beidou is a 4-star Electro Claymore sub-DPS whose Elemental Burst (Stormbreaker) creates a lightning arc that chains between enemies, dealing massive AoE Electro damage. Her Elemental Skill (Tidecaller) is a unique parry/counter that deals devastating damage when timed correctly. Beidou excels against 2+ enemies — her burst chains 5 times per discharge, making her one of the strongest AoE damage dealers in the game. Paired with Fischl as a battery, she forms the core of the legendary 'Taser' team composition.
weapon_bottom_line: Serpent Spine (BP) is her best 4-star — CR substat + DMG bonus. Akuoumaru R5 excels with high team energy. For F2P, Prototype Archaic is a solid craftable. Luxurious Sea-Lord (event) is excellent if you have it.

weapons.name: Serpent Spine R5
weapons.notes: Best 4-star. CR + up to 50% DMG bonus at R5. Beidou is off-field so she won't lose stacks. Battle Pass exclusive.

weapons.name: Wolf's Gravestone
weapons.notes: High base ATK + team ATK buff. Good stat stick. Passive triggers on low-HP enemies for extra team ATK.

weapons.name: Akuoumaru R5
weapons.notes: Excellent. Burst DMG scales with total team energy cost. In Taser team (80+80+80+60=300), huge burst bonus.

weapons.name: Prototype Archaic R5
weapons.notes: F2P craftable. Solid ATK stat stick. Passive deals extra AoE damage on hit. Always available.

artifact_why: Best overall. Converts ER into Burst DMG. Beidou needs 160-180% ER as solo Electro, so Emblem provides ~40% Burst DMG bonus. Her burst is her primary damage source.
artifact_alt: 2pc Thundering Fury + 2pc ATK% — competitive if you have good substats. Less ER-dependent.

main_stats.sands_note: ER% if below 160% (solo Electro). ATK% if paired with Fischl battery.

sub_priority: 4. Elemental Mastery — nice but not priority

teams.name: Taser
teams.desc: The classic. Sucrose drives with normal attacks. Beidou + Fischl provide off-field Electro. Xingqiu provides Hydro. Massive AoE Electro-Charged chains.

teams.name: Aggravate
teams.desc: Double Electro Aggravate. Beidou provides AoE + damage reduction. Fischl batteries. Nahida provides EM buff. Strong against 2+ enemies.

teams.name: Overload (Chevreuse)
teams.desc: Overload team. Beidou provides AoE Electro + interrupt resistance. Chevreuse shreds Pyro/Electro RES.

rotation_code: Fischl E (summon Oz) → Beidou E+Q (snapshot buffs) → Xingqiu E+Q (rain swords) → Sucrose NA spam (driver + swirl) → Beidou E (counter) → Repeat
rotation_key: Beidou's Q snapshots — cast after all buffs are active. Her perfect counter (E) deals massive damage — learn enemy attack patterns. C2 makes her burst chain to 2 additional targets (5 total).
mistakes: Running Beidou as solo Electro without ER — her 80-cost burst needs Fischl battery or 160%+ ER. Without it, you burst once every 3 rotations.
Not using C2 — C2 makes Stormbreaker chain to 5 enemies (from 3). This is her biggest power spike. Worth buying from Paimon's Bargains.
Not snapshotting — Beidou's burst snapshots ATK and DMG% buffs. Always cast buffs first, then Q.
Leveling Normal Attack — Beidou's damage comes from E and Q. NA only matters if she's the on-field driver.

seo.title: Beidou Build Guide — Best Weapons, Artifacts, Teams | GenshinGuide
seo.description: Complete Beidou build guide for Genshin Impact v5.6. Best weapons, Emblem of Severed Fate artifacts, Taser and Aggravate team compositions, counter timing and rotation guide.
